title: Income Tax Return Filing Bangalore | Virtual Auditor
description: Expert income tax return filing in Bangalore. All ITR types. Salaried, startup, business, NRI returns. ESOP/RSU taxation. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for income tax return filing in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor provides comprehensive ITR filing services in Bangalore, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). All return types — ITR-1 through ITR-7 — for individuals, businesses, startups, and NRIs.

What is Income Tax Return Filing Bangalore | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  ITR filing for all taxpayer categories — salaried employees with Form 16, professionals under Section 44ADA, startups and companies under Section 115BAA/115BAB, and NRIs with Indian income. ESOP and RSU taxation — perquisite valuation, exercise vs sale timing, and DTAA credits for employees of multinational companies. Startup tax benefit claims — Section 80-IAC (3-year tax holiday), angel tax exemption documentation, and carry-forward of losses. Capital gains computation with indexation, grandfathering, and reinvestment exemptions (Section 54/54EC/54F). Tax regime comparison — detailed old vs new regime analysis with recommendation. Advance tax computation and quarterly calendar.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for ITR Filing in Bangalore
  Bangalore's IT/startup workforce faces unique tax situations — RSU income from US-listed employers, ESOP exercises, multiple house property ownership, and significant equity market participation. These require careful computation that basic filing services cannot handle correctly. CA V. Viswanathan handles complex returns including multiple capital gain categories, foreign income credit under DTAA, and startup-specific benefits. Our MG Road office provides in-person tax consultation for complex scenarios.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Document collection — Form 16, AIS/TIS download, investment proofs, capital gains data. Step 2: AIS reconciliation — match all income sources with Annual Information Statement. Step 3: Tax computation under optimal regime. Step 4: Return preparation with full disclosure and deduction optimisation. Step 5: E-filing and e-verification. Step 6: Refund tracking and intimation response support.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need ITR filing in Bangalore? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001

faqs.q: How do you handle RSU/ESOP taxation for Bangalore IT employees?
faqs.a: We compute perquisite value at exercise (difference between FMV and exercise price), claim employer TDS credit, and compute capital gains at sale. For US-listed company RSUs, we also claim DTAA credit for taxes paid in the US through foreign tax credit (Form 67).

faqs.q: Can startups claim tax holiday through ITR filing?
faqs.a: Yes. DPIIT-recognised startups can claim a 3-year tax holiday under Section 80-IAC. We handle the eligibility verification, Inter-Ministerial Board certification process, and correct ITR schedule filing to claim this benefit.

faqs.q: What documents do I need for ITR filing?
faqs.a: Form 16 (salaried), AIS/TIS from income tax portal, bank statements, capital gains statements from brokers, investment proofs (80C, 80D, HRA), and home loan certificate. We provide a detailed checklist at engagement start.
